use_cases: Collecting user text input in forms such as login, registration, and contact forms
Accepting email, password, or search queries in web applications
Acting as a base component for building more complex form inputs like comboboxes or masked inputs
Serving as a reusable styled input across a design system or component library
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable text input component from the ekmas design system built with React and Tailwind CSS. Provides a styled wrapper around the native HTML input element with ref forwarding, accessibility focus states, and consistent border, spacing, and typography utilities. Designed as a foundational atomic component for building any form-based interface requiring user text entry.
